mapper.select: SELECT * FROM script ORDER BY IFNULL(updated_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM script WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY IFNULL(updated_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO script(script_name, type, difficulty, need_dm_level, min_players, max_players, duration, price, cover_image, tags, description) VALUES(#{scriptName}, #{type}, #{difficulty}, #{needDmLevel}, #{minPlayers}, #{maxPlayers}, #{duration}, #{price}, #{coverImage}, #{tags}, #{description})
